idea.title: Claw Tycoon
idea.hook: Run a claw-machine arcade — aim and drop the claw to grab adorable plushies, sell them for coins, upgrade your claws and machines, and grow a prize empire.
idea.hook_ru: Управляй залом автоматов с клешнёй — наводи и опускай клешню, хватай милых игрушек, продавай за монеты, качай клешни и автоматы и строй империю призов.
idea.prototype: Active-then-idle management tycoon: DRAG to aim a claw over a cabinet packed with plushies, TAP/release to drop and grab (grip × accuracy × plushie weight resolve the grab). A good grab serves the front customer + auto-sells the plushie for coins (× tier × machine × shelf × combo). Deep upgrade tree: Claw Grip, Aim Sensor, Drop Motor, Auto-Clerks (passive cps + auto-serve), Prize Shelves (income ×), Restockers, and UNLOCK 8 machine TYPES (each ×2.5 income + re-skin + rarer prizes). Combo multiplier for consecutive grabs; golden VIP customers pay big tips. Non-timer pressure: a customer-queue REPUTATION meter that drains when the front customer waits unserved → GAMEOVER (arcade empties) at 0. Endless score = total coins this run; arcade-rating ranks (Corner Stall → Prize Empire) are the milestone ladder. In-session idle only (offline accrual deferred to iterate); run persists across refresh.
idea.mutation_of: idle_tycoon archetype (Pizza Inc / Firestone / Merge Mercs, #2 CTR archetype) × cozy_cute collectible archetype (Cattosu Chonk Cat Merge / Kitten Out) × our sim/tycoon/idle portfolio winners (sim 94s, tycoon 85s, idle 45s, all 100% liked)
idea.why_novel: first claw-machine / arcade-operator game in the portfolio; fuses an ACTIVE skill beat (aim+drop+grab) onto the idle-tycoon money loop so the player physically earns each payout, while the cozy_cute plushie collectible angle (4 plushie rarities, 8 machine skins) targets the under-served cute-collectible CTR lane; customer-queue reputation gives active non-timer pressure + a real lose condition that doing-nothing reaches in ~15-22s
idea.non_timer_pressure: customer-queue reputation (front customer waits unserved → satisfaction drains → arcade empties)
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when satisfaction <= 0 for 1 frame; front customer drains DRAIN_PER_WAITING=4.5/s (back of line ×0.15), spawn every SPAWN_BASE=2.6s → standing still empties 100 satisfaction in ~15-22s; relieved by landing successful grabs (each serve +22) or hiring Auto-Clerks

sources.title: Pizza Inc.
sources.snippet: Top idle_tycoon CTR reference (score 100, 2026-06-08 swipe file) — factory/money/upgrade loop visible in one glance, big reward pile; idle_tycoon is the #2 CTR archetype today

sources.title: Firestone - кликер idle онлайн RPG
sources.snippet: idle_tycoon archetype reference (score 100) — idle/clicker with visible production + upgrade loop; one of the canonical idle_tycoon CTR covers

sources.title: Merge Mercs: Tower Defense TD
sources.snippet: idle_tycoon/merge-economy reference (score 100) — escalating economy + upgrade chain; cited for the money-pile + simple-production-chain CTR composition

sources.title: Tim portfolio: sim 94s / tycoon 85s / idle 45s per play, all 100% liked
sources.snippet: sim/tycoon/idle are the highest time-per-play, 100%-liked AND under-explored families in the portfolio — the highest-retention-ceiling gap; this build extends them with a cozy_cute claw-arcade tycoon

synthesizer_brief: Single-game build for 2026-06-08 (folder 153). SIGNAL: idle_tycoon is the #2 CTR archetype on Yandex/CrazyGames today (Pizza Inc, Firestone, Merge Mercs — factory/money/upgrade loop in one glance), and the cozy_cute collectible lane (Cattosu Chonk Cat Merge, Kitten Out) is a proven cute-object CTR composition. KNOWLEDGE: the portfolio's highest time-per-play AND 100%-liked families are sim (94s), tycoon (85s) and idle (45s), all UNDEREXPLORED — the highest retention ceiling we have. North-star: an addictive 10-minute CORE LOOP — TTFF <15s (first drag→drop→grab→coins in ~8-10s), something new every 1-2 min (grip/accuracy → first auto-clerk → machine 2 ×2.5 → shelf/restock → VIPs → machines 3-8 + rating ranks → combo mastery), with the customer-queue reputation meter as active non-timer pressure mirroring our proven spam-fail/skill-survives structure. The ACTIVE aim+drop+grab beat differentiates it from pure-tap idles and feeds the cozy_cute plushie-collectible CTR angle (4 rarities, 8 machine skins). Cross-session retention (offline accrual, daily quests, franchise prestige) deferred to the iteration ladder.

alternatives.title: Deep-Sea Salvage Idle
alternatives.hook: drop a salvage claw/magnet to the seabed, haul wrecks + treasure, upgrade the rig and dive deeper
alternatives.mutation_of: deep-dive idle (Dig and Descend / depth-tier idles)
alternatives.why_novel: ON THE TABLE — same drop-and-haul active-idle skeleton as Claw Tycoon but a salvage theme; SKIPPED this slot because the candy-arcade plushie theme hits the cozy_cute CTR lane harder and reads cuter at icon scale

alternatives.title: Pottery Studio Idle
alternatives.hook: spin and shape clay on a wheel, glaze and fire pots, sell them, automate kilns and unlock styles
alternatives.why_novel: ON THE TABLE — cozy maker-idle with a satisfying shaping beat; SKIPPED because the shaping mechanic is fiddlier on mobile than aim+drop and the claw-grab juice is more immediately legible

alternatives.title: Lane Auto-Battler
alternatives.hook: deploy and merge units that auto-fight escalating lanes of enemies
alternatives.why_novel: ON THE TABLE — strong CTR archetype; SKIPPED because the merge/auto-battler family is already heavily represented in the portfolio (merge_conquest, merge_guns, merge_defense) and idle_tycoon-cute is the gap

alternatives.title: Action-RPG Dungeon Descent
alternatives.hook: tap to attack down procedurally-stacked dungeon floors, loot gear, push deeper
alternatives.why_novel: ON THE TABLE — high ceiling but heavier content + combat-balance scope than fits a single-session 10-minute-loop build; deferred in favor of a tighter economy loop

alternatives.title: Roguelite Deckbuilder
alternatives.hook: draft a deck, fight escalating encounters, build synergies across a run
alternatives.why_novel: ON THE TABLE — deep genre but high first-session complexity (teaching deckbuilding in <15s is hard) and weaker glance-CTR than a money-pile tycoon cover; SKIPPED for this slot
